description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated figure in a meditative pose, reminiscent of traditional representations of the Buddha. The figure is adorned with intricate detailing on the robe and jewelry, with a textured surface that suggests weathering or age. The sculpture is primarily a reddish-brown color with areas of darker patina, giving it an antique appearance. The figure sits cross-legged on a decorated base, with one hand resting on the knee and the other in the lap. The back of the sculpture shows draped fabric and a smooth, rounded head. The entire piece is mounted on a simple, flat platform.
description: A weathered, reddish-brown seated Buddha sculpture with intricate robe and jewelry details, mounted on a flat base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serene face, detailed robe, and both hands in a meditative pose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the layered folds of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back of the head, draped fabric, and the decorated base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and the detailed base edge.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a simple platform, suggesting an indoor or outdoor public setting such as a park, plaza, or temple courtyard.
